title: Supreme Court Justice NK Singh, HC judges to speak at DNLU conference on arbitration reforms
description: The Dharmashastra National Law University (DNLU), Jabalpur will be hosting a national conference on the “Evolution of Arbitration in India: Today’s Scenario, Emerging Challenges & Proactive Reforms” on March 14, 2026, at 10.30 AM.The event will bring together judges and leading practitioners to discuss the future of arbitration and dispute resolution in India.As India’s economy continues to expand and modernise, efficient dispute resolution mechanisms have become central to sustaining commer
